123 Oak Ridge Drive, Apartment B

$2,450/month
Bedrooms
2
Bathrooms
1.5
Square Feet
950
Pet Policy: Cats allowed, small dogs with approval (max 15 lbs). Pet deposit required.
Amenities:
in-unit laundry central ac parking hardwood floors fitness center pool
Photos:
Beautiful 2-bedroom, 1.5-bath apartment in the heart of downtown. Newly renovated with hardwood floors throughout. Large living room with lots of natural light. In-unit washer and dryer for convenience. Building features a fitness center and resort-style pool. Walkable to restaurants, shops, and public transit. Close to parks and hiking trails. Great neighborhood with a strong sense of community. Lease terms: 12 months minimum. Available for move-in on the first of the month.
Questions? Contact the leasing office or visit our website for more information.
